paper_title: Open LLM Leaderboard (v1 and v2) by Hugging Face
evaluation_method: The Open LLM Leaderboard is a meta-benchmark aggregating scores from multiple constituent benchmarks. V1 used: ARC (25-shot), HellaSwag (10-shot), MMLU (5-shot), TruthfulQA (0-shot), Winogrande (5-shot), GSM8K (5-shot). V2 uses: IFEval, BBH (3-shot), MATH Lvl 5 (4-shot), GPQA (0-shot), MuSR (0-shot), MMLU-PRO (5-shot). All evaluations run via the EleutherAI LM Evaluation Harness on standardized GPU clusters. Constituent benchmarks use a mix of log-likelihood-based scoring (normalized and unnormalized) and generative evaluation with exact match.
metric: Aggregate normalized accuracy across constituent benchmarks
